arguments.analysis: The research conducted on WiFi penetration testing techniques yielded no findings across all phases, including reconnaissance, scanning, exploitation, post-exploitation, and reporting. This indicates a significant gap in available resources and information regarding the methodologies and tools utilized in these phases. Further investigation and alternative sources are necessary to gather the required insights into WiFi penetration testing.
